passiveAbilities.name: Evolution [Grub]
passiveAbilities.description: This character cannot be taken into a Troupe containing the named character or vice versa.

passiveAbilities.name: Enchanted Secateurs
passiveAbilities.description: All Melee damage generated by this model count as Magical instead of the listed type.

activeAbilities.name: Passage of the Seasons
activeAbilities.description: Place this model within target Wooded Patch. This ability may only be used if this model is within a Wooded Patch

arcaneAbilities.name: Verdant Growth
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a 50mm Diameter Wooded Patch within 3X" and LoS on open ground. This remains in place until end of game. A maximum of 3 Wooded Patches may be placed by this troupe, if a fourth is placed you must choose and remove a Wooded Patch you created earlier this game.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Wither
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Can’t Hit Me!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Your opponent’s attack deals W damage to you this round.
